summary: All three requirements (REQ-5, REQ-6, REQ-7) are implemented in the Dashboard.tsx file. The financial overview data is now calculated by referencing existing sections: REQ-5 retrieves from monthlyRevenues array (Résumé Mensuels), REQ-6 retrieves from totals.totalSoldeRestantNegatif (Listing Mensuel), and REQ-7 retrieves from totals.totalFaitEtPaye (Listing Mensuel). All three cards update based on the selectedMonth state variable.
